evals.prompt: Use the go-nolint-audit skill to audit the nolint directives in the Go project at skills/go-nolint-audit/evals/fixture
evals.expected_output: Phase 1 stale/active classification + Phase 2 adversarial Red/Blue/White debate with verdicts

assertions.name: phase1_classification
assertions.check: output categorizes directives as stale or active

assertions.name: scoring_present
assertions.check: output contains fixability and justification quality scores

assertions.name: verdict_given
assertions.check: output contains REMOVE, KEEP, or REWRITE verdict

assertions.name: concrete_diff
assertions.check: Red team provides a concrete code diff

assertions.name: bare_nolint_flagged
assertions.check: output flags the bare //nolint directive (no rule specified)

assertions.name: summary_table
assertions.check: output contains a summary table with file:line, rule, verdict, and effort columns
